reasoning: We're targeting your key limiter: poor lactate clearance. Your last ride showed a good base endurance but we need to focus on improving power at sustainable efforts for the Alpine Loop. Today's session will bridge the gap between short bursts and longer efforts.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4x10 minutes over-unders: 5 min at 201W, 3 min at 242W, 2 min at 256W. Focus on controlled breathing.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
